channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo Scores Third Number One Album With ‘You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love’
item.description: Olivia Rodrigo keeps slaying! 🌟🎶 Sending love to our girl with those chart-topping vibes! 💖 #OliviaRodrigo #NewMusicSuccessListener

item.title: André 3000 Releases 7 Piano Sketches Short Film
item.description: 🎹 Dive into André 3000's creative world with his new Piano Sketches short film! 🎥✨ Let the music take you on a journey! 🎶 #André3000 #NewRelease

item.title: SZA, Kenneth Blume Decry Use of Their Songs in AI Training Data Sets
item.description: When AI crosses the line 🤖🚫 Musicians speak out against their songs being used in training sets! #MusicNews #AIdebate 🎶

item.title: Bob Odenkirk’s Remake of The Room Gets Trailer: Watch
item.description: 🎬 Bob Odenkirk channels his inner Tommy Wiseau in 'The Room' remake trailer! 🎶🎥 Let the hilarity unfold! 👀 #TheRoom #BobOdenkirk

item.title: Ken Carson Returns With New Album Xperiment
item.description: 🚀 Ken Carson is back with a bang! 🎵 Get ready to vibe with his fresh new album, Xperiment! 🔥 #KenCarson #Xperiment #NewMusic
